scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.test: npm run build:main && node scripts/test-shared-logic.mjs && node scripts/test-forward-prompt.mjs && node scripts/test-document-prompt.mjs && node scripts/test-api-conversation.mjs && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron scripts/test-memory-store.mjs
scripts.test:memory: npm run build:main && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron scripts/test-memory-store.mjs
scripts.package:mac: npm run clean:package:mac && npm run generate-icons && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --universal
scripts.package:win: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=win npm run generate-icons && cross-env BUILD_TARGET=win npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.package:all: npm run package:mac && npm run package:win
